name: @daytona/pi
description: Pi coding agent extension that runs all tool calls inside a remote, ephemeral Daytona sandbox while the agent runs locally
author: Daytona Platforms Inc.

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run smoke
scripts.test:e2e-preview: node node_modules/@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent/dist/cli.js -e ./index.ts -e ./scripts/e2e-preview-provider.ts -ne --provider fake --model test --api-key dummy-key --daytona --blank --no-session -p 'start a server and give me the url'
scripts.test:live: npm run test:connectivity && npm run test:integration && npm run test:variants && npm run test:bash-bg && npm run test:recovery
